name: Iron Ore
source: Mined from hill and cave seams across Greyvale.
description: Heavy rust-streaked rock that clinks dully in the pack.

name: Iron Ingot
source: Smelted from iron ore at any forge or bought from smiths.
description: A cooled bar of grey iron, faintly warm at the core.

name: Copper Ingot
source: Smelted from copper found in shallow river veins.
description: Soft ruddy metal that takes a wire's bend without a sound.

name: Keldaran Steel
source: Folded by the smiths of Keldaran hold; traded in city markets.
description: Dense blue-grey steel that rings true when struck.

name: Keldaran Forged Steel
source: Salvaged from the plating of shattered War Golems (Crafting: Expert).
description: Plate steel still humming with the old forge-songs of the constructs.

name: Oak Wood
source: Felled in the temperate woods around the river settlements.
description: Pale close-grained timber that smells of sap and rain.

name: Pine Wood
source: Cut from the upland conifer slopes.
description: Light resin-sticky wood that splits with a clean crack.

name: Seasoned Hardwood
source: Aged and selected by carpenters for bows and hafts.
description: Springy dark wood that flexes without a creak.

name: Thornveld Ironwood
source: Harvested from the petrified groves of the Thornveld.
description: Wood gone hard as stone, ringing faintly under the axe.

name: Medicinal Herb
source: Foraged in meadows and forest verges.
description: A bitter green sprig that stings the nose when crushed.

name: Herb Bundle
source: Gathered and tied by field healers and herbalists.
description: A fragrant fist of dried stalks bound in twine.

name: Sageroot
source: Dug from shaded streambanks; prized by alchemists.
description: A pale root that hums with a clean medicinal sharpness.

name: Nightshade
source: Picked from shadowed hollows; handled with care.
description: Dark glossy berries that weep a sour, oily juice.

name: Wolf Pelt
source: Skinned from wolves felled on the trails.
description: Coarse grey fur still carrying the cold of the wild.

name: Boar Hide
source: Taken from wild boar in the lowland brush.
description: Thick bristled hide that thuds when slapped flat.

name: Leather Strip
source: Cut and cured from common hides by tanners.
description: A supple band of tanned leather, oiled and quiet.

name: Quality Leather
source: Cured from stalker and bison hides for grips and cases.
description: Fine dark leather that creaks softly and holds its shape.

name: Troll Hide
source: Stripped from cave trolls; slow to stop knitting itself shut.
description: Rubbery green hide that twitches faintly long after the kill.

name: Wyrm Scales
source: Pried from cave wyrms (1d6 per kill).
description: Overlapping plates that chime like coins when shaken.

name: Greater Wyrm Scales
source: Cut from the flanks of deep-cave wyrms.
description: Dark iridescent scales that drink the torchlight.

name: Animal Bone
source: Salvaged from butchered beasts.
description: A dry knuckle of bone that knocks hollow.

name: Troll Bone
source: Broken from the dense skeleton of a cave troll.
description: Bone heavy as stone, marrow still faintly warm.

name: Wyrm Teeth
source: Drawn from the jaws of a slain wyrm.
description: Curved fangs that hiss against the whetstone.

name: Venom Sac
source: Extracted from giant spiders, rock vipers, and cave wyrms.
description: A taut translucent bladder sloshing with cloudy poison.

name: Dire Bear Heart
source: Cut from a slain dire bear; potent in restorative brews.
description: A fist of dark muscle that still gives a slow, heavy beat.

name: Thunderbird Feather
source: Pulled from a downed thunderbird on the storm peaks.
description: A long feather that crackles and lifts the hairs of the arm.

name: Storm Crystal
source: Grown in the gland of a thunderbird or tidecaller eel.
description: A jagged shard that ticks with caged lightning.

name: Thunderbird Oil
source: Rendered from thunderbird fat; volatile and prized.
description: A clear oil that snaps with tiny sparks when poured.

name: Drift Residue
source: Scraped from the dissolving form of a slain Shadeling.
description: A smear of grey ash that drifts upward against the wind.

name: Rend Shard
source: Recovered from a Mawling; must be purified before safe use.
description: A torn sliver that hums wrong, like a note held too long.

name: Spatial Residue
source: Condensed from a Hollow Weaver's unraveling; purify first.
description: A bead of nothing that the eye keeps sliding off of.

name: Hollow Shard
source: Splintered from Hollow-touched creatures and warded ruins.
description: A cold black flake that drinks the warmth from a closed fist.

name: Wrack Core
source: Cut from a Hollowed Knight or Veilrender; purify before use.
description: A dense knot of corruption that pulses like a slow heart.

name: Veil Shard
source: Shed by a Veilrender as the Veil tears.
description: A glassy splinter that shows a wrong sky when held to the eye.

name: Veilrender Carapace
source: Plated shell harvested from a Veilrender.
description: Chitin scored with seams that whisper when the wind crosses them.

name: Named Fragment
source: Left behind by a Choir, a Still, or the Architect.
description: A shard that murmurs a name you almost remember.

name: Arcane Dust
source: Ground from spent foci and reagents by enchanters.
description: Silver powder that glows faintly when breath stirs it.

name: Golem Core
source: Extracted from a War Golem's chest (Crafting: Expert).
description: A caged crystal heart that ticks with borrowed will.

name: Power Crystal
source: Drawn from a War Golem's reservoir (Arcana: Expert).
description: A crystal that warms the palm and hums a single low note.

name: Divine Material
source: Granted by temples or recovered from sanctified ruins.
description: A mote of light that rests cool and weightless in the hand.

name: Plant Fiber
source: Stripped from reeds, flax, and bark.
description: Tough green strands that squeak when twisted into cord.

name: Spider Silk
source: Reeled from giant spider webs in the deep woods.
description: Thread light as breath and stronger than it has any right to be.

name: Cave Gemstone
source: Found in cave wyrm nests (1d4 with Investigation: Trained).
description: A rough crystal that throws back the torch in a dozen colors.

name: Blessed Oil
source: Consecrated at temples; the standard purifying agent.
description: A golden oil that warms the skin and smells of incense.

name: Animal Fat
source: Rendered from butchered game.
description: A pale tallow that softens to grease in a warm hand.

name: Alchemical Reagent
source: Bought from alchemists; the workhorse of the laboratory.
description: A vial of restless liquid that fizzes against the glass.

name: Crystal Flask
source: Blown by glassworkers; reusable vessel for potions.
description: A clear flask that rings a high clean note when tapped.

name: Enchanted Stone
source: Recovered from War Golems and Deepstone Guardians.
description: A grey stone that holds a faint warmth and a fainter pulse.

name: Whetstone
source: Bought cheap from any general store (1 sp).
description: A worn grey block that hisses when steel is drawn across it.
